meaning: n.字母表,基本知识 美国广播公司 澳大利亚广播公司;automatic brightness control,自动亮度调节
examples: One ABC correspondent had totally missed the point of the question.
He worked in the news division of ABC – he was the anchor of its 15-minute evening newscast.
He said, "That was way above my pay scale. I was working for ABC."
Berman started at ABC News as a desk assistant working the overnight shift in 1995.
Bittermann joined CNN from ABC News, where he was a Paris news correspondent from 1990-1996.
